violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (currently has air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Guidance document provided. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The ceiling in the ware washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Per PIC, tiles are on site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150 to 400 ppm. Sanitizer adjusted to proper mixture at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023

The wall mounted Sanitizer Mixer located at the 3 Bay Sink was not in good repair. Dispenser was observed not to be dispensing appropriate sanitizer at the time of inspection. PIC to instruct employees to manually add Quaternary Ammonium Sanitizer to the 3 Bay Sink Sanitizer Compartment for a proper mixture of 150 to 400 parts per million as stated on the manufacturers label until wall mounted mixer is adjusted/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

The ceiling in the ware-washing/prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Floors, floor coverings, walls, wall coverings, and ceilings shall be designed, constructed, and installed so they are SMOOTH and EASILY CLEANABLE. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
